items.title: Mum rescued from Venezuela rubble with newborn baby tells BBC how he helped her survive
items.summary: The "miracle" rescue of 18-day-old baby Juan David is a symbol of hope in Venezuela after the devastating earthquakes.

items.title: Sixth person dies after shooting at youth welfare centre in Germany
items.summary: Four women and a man were shot dead at the scene while a sixth person died in hospital, police say.

items.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump's appeal of E Jean Carroll's sexual abuse case
items.summary: The decision means the US president will now have to pay her the $5m (£3.6m) in damages she had been awarded.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 芬蘭總統籲烏俄停火60天　稱烏克蘭狀態佳有利談判
items.summary: 芬蘭總統史塔布接受政治新聞網站Politico專訪表示，烏克蘭在軍事與政治與經濟上都處於開戰以來的最佳狀態，呼籲各界把握時機推動無條件的60天停火。他表示，俄羅斯在這場戰爭中面臨戰略失敗。 ...…

items.title: 持續大雨福建刺刀峽谷發生意外  9人探險5人溺斃
items.summary: 中國福建省莆田市仙遊縣「刺刀峽谷」28日發生意外，9名戶外探險者遇險，其中5人溺水死亡，4人獲救。刺刀峽谷並非對公眾開放景點，有網友指當地近日持續下雨，發生意外的隊伍可能被捲入瀑布底。  ...…

items.title: 英國海軍首艘混合戰艦 結合無人系統取代傳統驅逐艦
items.summary: 英國持續發展結合載人、無人和自主系統的「混合海軍」（Hybrid Navy），國防部今天宣布擬建造至少6艘「通用戰鬥艦」，這將是英國海軍第一批「混合戰艦」，將整合空中、海上及海下無人系統，提...…
